{{Quote|If I were you, Zorba, I'd calm down. Have yourself a drink of zoochberry juice.|Tibor to Zorba Desilijic Tiure|<ref name="Zorba" />}}
'''Zoochberry juice''' was a beverage containing [[Zoochberry/Legends|zoochberry]] that was potable by [[Human/Legends|Humans]].<ref name="Queen" /> In [[5 ABY/Legends|5 ABY]],<ref name="Date">''[[The Essential Reader's Companion]]'' places the events of ''[[Zorba the Hutt's Revenge]]'', which includes [[Zorba Desilijic Tiure]]'s arrival in [[Chalmun's Spaceport Cantina/Legends|Chalmun's Spaceport Cantina]], in [[5 ABY/Legends|5 ABY]].</ref> the [[Hutt/Legends|Hutt]] [[Zorba Desilijic Tiure]] barged into [[Chalmun's Spaceport Cantina/Legends|Chalmun's Spaceport Cantina]] on the [[Planet/Legends|planet]] [[Tatooine/Legends|Tatooine]], desperate to learn why he could not enter his [[Reproduction/Legends|son]] [[Jabba Desilijic Tiure/Legends|Jabba's]] [[Jabba's Palace/Legends|palace]]. The [[Barabel/Legends|Barabel]] [[Tibor]] recommended that Zorba calm down and consume some zoochberry juice, which only exacerbated his rage.<ref name="Zorba" />

In the same [[Standard year/Legends|year]], zoochberry juice was served in significant quantities at a housewarming party at the Human [[Han Solo/Legends|Han Solo's]] [[Han Solo's sky house|sky house]] on the planet [[Bespin/Legends|Bespin]]. Solo spent the party ensuring the zoochberry glasses were full while interacting with his guests.<ref name="Zorba" /> A short [[Time/Legends|time]] later, Solo and the Human [[Leia Organa Solo/Legends|Leia Organa]] traveled to the [[Space station/Legends|space station]] [[Hologram Fun World]] to [[Marriage/Legends|elope]]. After their arrival they were given glasses of zoochberry juice by their friend and the station's [[Baron Administrator/Legends|baron administrator]], [[Lando Calrissian/Legends|Lando Calrissian]], who also partook of the beverage.<ref name="Queen" />

==Behind the scenes==
Zoochberry juice first appeared in ''[[Zorba the Hutt's Revenge]]'', a [[1992]] junior novel by [[Paul Davids|Paul]] and [[Hollace Davids]].<ref name="Queen" />

==Appearances==
*''[[Zorba the Hutt's Revenge]]'' {{1st}}
*''[[Queen of the Empire]]''
